title: Multiple owners each with single Subitem
excerpt: I want to be able to assign multiple owners to a task, each owner will then get a subitem that will automatically be assigned to them. Owners may be added or removed at anytime and may not be present at the Items creatio…

posts.author: shaun.b (Shaun B)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to assign multiple owners to a task, each owner will then get a subitem that will automatically be assigned to them. Owners may be added or removed at anytime and may not be present at the Items creation.

I have been able to automate it for 1 person but if you try 2+ then each time you add another person the current owners get an additional sub item.
